question_html:
Write down the correct forms of verbs in the following sentences:

(a) The beggar was found (stand) at the door.

(b) Mary had John (wash) the car.

(c) The batsman (strike) the ball with all his might.

(d) Neela (burn) her hand when she was cooking.

(e) By 2026, I (work) for this firm 15 years.
solution_html:
(a) standing

(b) wash

(c) struck

(d) burnt/burned

(e) will have worked

Marks Distribution:

(0.5× 5) = 2.5 marks for writing the correct form of verbs.

question_html:
Right down one synonym of the words given below:

(a) Expunge (b) Fictitious (c) Forthcoming (d) Hostile (e) Gratitude
solution_html:
(a) Erase / Delete / Remove / Obliterate / Wipe out / Efface / Annihilate / Eliminate / Extinguish / Exterminate / Purge / Strike out / Cancel

(b) Imaginary / Invented / Fabricated / False / Unreal / Made-up / Mythical / Illusory / Pretended / Bogus / Feigned / Phony

(c) Upcoming / Approaching / Impending / Imminent / Pending / Oncoming / Expected / Available / Open / Communicative / Responsive / Cooperative

(d) Unfriendly / Antagonistic / Aggressive / Adverse / Opposed / Inimical / Belligerent / Threatening / Resistant / Warlike / Combative / Contentious

(e) Thankfulness / Appreciation / Gratefulness / Recognition / Acknowledgment / Indebtedness / Praise / Respect / Regard

Marks Distribution:

(0.5× 5) = 2.5 marks for writing the synonyms.
